meta_title: Removals Lewes | Moving Home in Sussex
meta_description: Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a complete moving and storage service to clients across Lewes and Sussex. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, we provide a local & national removals service to clients in Lewes, Brighton and across Sussex.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Premier Removals Lewes and Sussex

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving we offer a complete moving and storage service. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, you can put your trust in us to look after your move.

How can we help you today?

Moving Home in Lewes? Let us make your journey as 'Smooth as Silk'

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Moving  

Choosing the right removals firm is extremely important, you need to know that you have secured good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the day of your move will understand your requirements properly and have both the training and equipment necessary to ensure a successful and straightforward move.

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving we offer a complete moving service for removals in Lewes, Brighton and the surrounding area of Sussex. From moving single items like 3 piece suites locally, to moving entire 4 bed households up to Scotland, we are well equipped with the latest equipment, knowledgeable staff and skill to handle your move with ease.

A moving company you can trust

Mark Ratcliffe has been working in the UK domestic removals and storage market, working with customers throughout Lewes, the South East and nationally, for over 30 years. Quality is at the heart of everything we do, it is what we have built our well respected reputation within the industry upon. Our removal firm are one of just a handful with a dedicated staff training centre. All of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, wrapping and moving household furniture for home and overseas moving, as well as customer services and vehicle loading. You are guaranteed the highest standards, competitive prices and a genuine commitment from everyone involved in your move when choosing Mark Ratcliffe Moving.

After your initial enquiry Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home, at a time convenient for you, to carry out a site survey and discuss all aspects of your forthcoming move. During this time we can discuss your packing requirements and any insurance cover for your valuable possessions that may be required. A fixed quotation can be provided for moving, packing and storage and we also offer a house clearance service that we can provide further information on. On your moving day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect your carpets, cover exposed doors and banisters etc. If required, they will also pack and move your belongings with the utmost care and transport them safely to your new home in Lewes or further afield.

Professional Packing Service Lewes

Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a packing service including both full packing options or the packing of fragile items only. If you decide to carry out your own packing, we can provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc. All products are minimal in cost and they can be collected from our shop located in Eastbourne, 7 days a week.

Safe and Secure Storage in Lewes

As part of our comprehensive moving service, we are also able to provide secure self storage rooms to rent for customers who prefer to deposit / remove their own goods to / from store. The rooms are available in various sizes with our most popular size being 77 sqft which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres. We rent this size room at £30 plus vat per week and with our storage rooms being much higher than local competitors and prices  being over 50% less, you receive great value for money. Please feel free to call in at any time to view our rooms and satisfy yourself that your possessions will be stored in a secure, damp free and clean environment. There is also great access for loading / unloading and you are the only key holder.

Whether you are moving within Lewes or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready and able to help. We can satisfy all of your wider moving needs including secure storage, export packing and house clearance. Our friendly team would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation. Please call Sharon Harris at our Eastbourne branch on 01323 848 008 to talk through your moving requirements. Our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or by appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store Customers is also available.
